summary: Ad A/B Test System Testing Complete: All 36 backend tests passed, all frontend components verified (AdTestPlanner, LaunchSimulator, AdTestsPage, sidebar nav link)
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/variations/{product_id} returns 200 for valid product (PUBLIC)
Backend: Variations response contains product_id, product_name, variations array
Backend: Variations array contains exactly 3 variations
Backend: Each variation has variation_id, label, hook_type, hook_id, hook_line, video_structure, script, cta, recommended_length, effectiveness_estimate
Backend: Variation labels are A, B, C
Backend: Each variation script has exactly 5 scenes
Backend: Script scenes have time, action, audio fields
Backend: effectiveness_estimate is valid 0-100 integer
Backend: test_plan included in response
Backend: test_plan has exactly 6 steps
Backend: test_plan has exactly 4 metrics_to_track
Backend: test_plan has budget_per_variation, total_budget, duration
Backend: Variations returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: POST /api/ad-tests/create requires authentication
Backend: Create requires product_id
Backend: Create returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/my requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/my returns tests array with total count
Backend: Existing completed test has winner info (Variation B, CTR 2.8%)
Backend: Test winner has variation_id, label, ctr, vs_average fields
Backend: Filter by status=active works
Backend: Filter by status=completed works
Backend: PUT /api/ad-tests/{test_id}/results requires authentication
Backend: Update results returns 404 for non-existent test
Backend: POST /api/ad-tests/{test_id}/complete requires authentication
Backend: Complete returns 404 for non-existent test
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{product_id} requires authentication
Backend: Simulate returns 200 for valid product
Backend: Simulation has profit_per_sale, estimated_cvr, estimated_cpc, estimated_cpa, daily_sales_range, daily_profit_range
Backend: Daily ranges have low/high structure
Backend: Simulation returns potential (High/Moderate/Risky)
Backend: Simulation returns risks array
Backend: Simulation returns guidance text
Backend: Simulation returns breakeven_days
Backend: Simulation returns inputs_used with launch_score, trend_stage, competition
Backend: Simulate returns 404 for non-existent product
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Ad Tests' navigation link (data-testid='nav-ad-tests')
Frontend: AdTestPlanner component (data-testid='ad-test-planner') present on product detail page
Frontend: AdTestPlanner has gradient header (orange-red)
Frontend: AdTestPlanner has 2 tabs (Variations, Test Plan)
Frontend: AdTestPlanner shows 3 variation cards (A/B/C) with hook type, structure, effectiveness, CTA, expandable script
Frontend: AdTestPlanner shows 'Start A/B Test' button (data-testid='start-test-btn')
Frontend: AdTestPlanner Test Plan tab shows 6 steps with descriptions
Frontend: AdTestPlanner Test Plan tab shows 4 metrics (CTR, CPC, ATC Rate, Purchases) with good/poor thresholds
Frontend: LaunchSimulator component (data-testid='launch-simulator') present on product detail page
Frontend: LaunchSimulator has gradient header (green) with 'Moderate Potential' badge
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows projections grid (data-testid='sim-projections') with Profit per Sale, Est. Conversion, Break-even Ad Cost, Daily Sales Range
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows detailed metrics (Estimated CPC, Estimated CPA, Daily Profit Range, Break-even Timeline, Assumed Daily Budget)
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows risk factors section (data-testid='sim-risks')
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows beginner guidance (data-testid='sim-guidance')
Frontend: LaunchSimulator shows 'View simulation inputs' expandable
Frontend: /ad-tests page (data-testid='ad-tests-page') shows title 'Ad A/B Tests'
Frontend: Ad Tests page shows Active/Completed counts
Frontend: Ad Tests page shows test card with product name, status badge, 3 variations
Frontend: Completed test shows winner info with trophy icon (Variation B, CTR 2.8%)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Ad A/B Test and Launch Simulator components verified)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (1 completed ad test with winner Variation B already exists)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad A/B Test System fully verified. 6 backend endpoints: GET /api/ad-tests/variations/{id} (PUBLIC), POST /api/ad-tests/create (AUTH), GET /api/ad-tests/my (AUTH), PUT /api/ad-tests/{id}/results (AUTH), POST /api/ad-tests/{id}/complete (AUTH), GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{id} (AUTH). Frontend components: AdTestPlanner on product detail page (gradient header, Variations/Test Plan tabs, 3 variation cards A/B/C, Start A/B Test button), LaunchSimulator on product detail page (gradient header, projections grid, risk factors, guidance), AdTestsPage at /ad-tests (list of tests with status badges and winner info), sidebar 'Ad Tests' nav link. Existing completed test for test product has winner Variation B with CTR 2.8%.

backend_endpoints.variations: GET /api/ad-tests/variations/{product_id} (PUBLIC) - Returns 3 variations with scripts + test_plan
backend_endpoints.create: POST /api/ad-tests/create (AUTH) - Creates test with status='active', 3 variations with results fields
backend_endpoints.my_tests: GET /api/ad-tests/my (AUTH) - Returns user's ad tests, filterable by status
backend_endpoints.update_results: PUT /api/ad-tests/{test_id}/results (AUTH) - Updates variation results, auto-determines winner
backend_endpoints.complete: POST /api/ad-tests/{test_id}/complete (AUTH) - Marks completed, saves to ad_learnings
backend_endpoints.simulate: GET /api/ad-tests/simulate/{product_id} (AUTH) - Returns simulation with projections, risks, guidance

features: Hook type, structure, effectiveness, CTA per variation
Test Plan with 6 steps and 4 metrics

Ad_A/B_Test_System.auth_required: create, my, results, complete, simulate endpoints require auth; variations is PUBLIC

console_warnings: Mixed Content warning for notifications API - not related to Ad Test System
